properties.name: Weston Walmart Supercenter
properties.damage_description: Muddy floodwater surged into the store and parking lot

properties.name: Buckhannon Walmart Supercenter
properties.damage_description: Store and parking lot completely flooded with deep water

properties.name: Hotel near Weston Walmart / US-33-I-79 interchange (name not confirmed in sourcing)
properties.damage_description: High-water mark visible on an askew lobby door; first floor inundated with muddy water. News coverage did not name the specific hotel -- location is approximate (the I-79/US-33 interchange area, several hotels cluster here).

properties.name: South Kanawha Street, downtown Buckhannon
properties.damage_description: SUV mostly submerged in floodwater on the street

properties.name: Stonecoal Road
properties.damage_description: Road impassable due to flooding

properties.name: Country Club Road (near Vicksburg Road)
properties.damage_description: Road impassable due to flooding

properties.name: US-33 at base of Buckhannon Mountain
properties.damage_description: Highway flooded between Weston and Buckhannon

properties.name: US-33 near Huddle House, Buckhannon
properties.damage_description: Highway flooded between Weston and Buckhannon

properties.name: US-33 at Brushy Fork intersection
properties.damage_description: Highway flooded between Weston and Buckhannon

properties.name: US Route 19 near Goodhope
properties.damage_description: Large portion of the highway impassable due to flooding

properties.name: Upshur County Courthouse
properties.damage_description: County government closed the Courthouse, Annex, and Administrative Annex due to flooding. Note: this building is a contributing structure in the Downtown Buckhannon Historic District (see heritage layer).

properties.name: St. Joseph's Hospital of Buckhannon
properties.damage_description: Cancelled all clinic, outpatient, and scheduled surgical appointments due to flooding

properties.name: Sheetz (Buckhannon)
properties.damage_description: Store and parking lot completely surrounded by water, flooding into the roadways (observed 2:20pm 7/22)

properties.name: East 4th Street (Weston)
properties.damage_description: Street flooding on East 4th Street

properties.name: Greens Run Road tornado damage cluster (Pleasants County)
properties.damage_description: Tornado damage, not flooding -- a separate hazard from the same storm system. A cell tower was bent over near Route 16; the WRRR-FM (93-R) transmitter tower collapsed down a hillside; at least one nearby home lost its roof and garage, and a falling tower narrowly missed a neighboring home (resident names known from sourcing, withheld here). Approximate location (road-level, not exact structure).

properties.name: Riverview Estates (trailer park), St. Marys area -- location approximate
properties.damage_description: Tornado damage, not flooding -- a separate hazard from the same storm system. Two mobile homes flipped and carports destroyed near Wrights Riverside Marine. Exact trailer-park location not found in OSM/Nominatim; placed at St. Marys town center as an approximate anchor.

properties.name: Stonewall Jackson Memorial Hospital (Mon Health)
properties.damage_description: Lost power, ran on generator; cancelled outpatient appointments (a second, distinct hospital from St. Joseph's Hospital of Buckhannon)
properties.source_name: Scripps/KMTV via Apple Valley News Now

properties.name: I-79 closure, Weston to Jane Lew -- location approximate
properties.damage_description: Interstate 79 closed for approximately 10 miles between Weston and Jane Lew. Point placed at Jane Lew as an approximate anchor for the closed stretch, not an exact spot.
properties.source_name: Scripps/KMTV via Apple Valley News Now

properties.name: Wingate by Wyndham Buckhannon
properties.damage_description: Dozens of guests evacuated by boat as floodwater surrounded the hotel

properties.name: Lincoln Street (Buckhannon)
properties.damage_description: Creek flooding swept vehicles into the street, including a Lowe's company truck

properties.name: Jawbone Park (Buckhannon)
properties.damage_description: A portable toilet and vehicles swept through the park by floodwater

properties.name: Moon Flower & Stone Tower Brews (Main Street, Buckhannon)
properties.damage_description: Two Main Street businesses closed due to flood damage/conditions

properties.name: Upshur County Annex / Senior Center
properties.damage_description: County administrative annex and senior center flood-affected (in addition to the already-mapped Upshur County Courthouse)

properties.name: Pop's Furniture (downtown Buckhannon) -- location approximate
properties.damage_description: Destroyed inventory piled outside on the street after flood damage. Exact address not found in OSM; placed at the downtown Main Street anchor.
